globalChecks.fixHint: Start from a canonical template and preserve all required top-level nodes.

rules: layouts.children[].children[].content.viewName must resolve to views.children[].viewName
views.currentView must reference an existing canvas
globalChecks.fixHint: Regenerate layouts/views together to remove dangling references.

rules: criteria.subjectArea == datasources.children[0].subjectArea
criteria.subjectArea and datasources.children[0].subjectArea must be canonical tokens (quoted subject area name or XSA(...) expression)
direct criteria column expressions ("SA"."Table"."Column" or XSA(...)."Table"."Column") must use criteria.subjectArea token
all columnID references in data models/logical edges/filter controls must exist in criteria.columns.children
globalChecks.fixHint: Rebind datasource and regenerate criteria/data model references from mapping contract.

rules: every @calculation("<columnID>") token in userExpression formulas must resolve to an existing criteria column
resolved @calculation references must target userExpression columns
globalChecks.fixHint: Repair stale calc references or regenerate calculation columns via PATCH_CALCULATION_CONTRACT_SCAFFOLD.

rules: calculation dependency graph derived from @calculation references must be acyclic
globalChecks.fixHint: Remove circular calc references and enforce topological dependency order.

rules: typed calculations (TEXT_GROUP/TIME_SERIES) must include criteriaConfig.settings.columnPropertyMap[columnID]
typed calc columnPropertyMap entries must include type,parentExpression,options and required type-specific options
globalChecks.fixHint: Ensure typed calculation payload exists in criteriaConfig.settings.columnPropertyMap using calculation-contracts.v1 defaults.

rules: referenced calc columns must appear before referencing calc columns in criteria.columns.children
globalChecks.fixHint: Reorder calc columns topologically before save.

rules: any non-direct formula column in criteria.columns.children must be persisted as userExpression=true
only direct source column references may remain non-userExpression
globalChecks.fixHint: Promote derived formulas to userExpression columns and add deterministic calc heading metadata.

rules: criteria column formulas must use OAC Logical SQL syntax, not source-workbook dialect functions
Tableau COUNTD(...) syntax is not valid OAC syntax; use governed measures or COUNT(DISTINCT ...)
POSITION(expr1 IN expr2) is valid OAC syntax and must not be rejected by this rule
globalChecks.fixHint: Translate foreign formula syntax to OAC Logical SQL before save.

rules: every filterControlDefaultValues.*ParameterBinding value must resolve to parameters.settings[].name
listParameterBinding must resolve to a multi-value parameter
globalChecks.fixHint: Declare each shared dashboard filter parameter in parameters.settings with _version 1.0.5; use multi-value text defaults for generated listbox shared filters.

rules: dataActions must be a top-level array, not a children container
each data action must include obitech-report/dataaction.AbstractDataAction with required source-schema fields
BI navigation data actions must include required target item, target canvas, parameter mapping, and namespace version fields
data action context and anchor columns must resolve to criteria.columns.children
globalChecks.fixHint: Author data actions using the BI Tech TypeSpec workbook/dataActions_0_0_0 shape and bind context/anchor columns to criteria columns.

rules: persisted number-format payloads under viewConfig settings must use BI Tech save-compatible enum values
abbreviationScale must be one of off,on,thousand,million,billion,trillion; use on for automatic abbreviation
negativeValuesStyle must be one of default,accounting,red,red_accounting; use default for minus-sign negatives
do not persist unsupported aliases such as abbreviationScale=auto or negativeValuesStyle=minus
globalChecks.fixHint: Normalize chart/table/map/network number-format payloads before save: abbreviationScale auto -> on, negativeValuesStyle minus -> default.

rules: layouts.children[].layoutProps.customProps.text is parsed by BI Tech LayoutProps.getCustomProps() and must be a valid JSON-encoded object string
split layouts must include oracle.bi.tech.layout.split.layoutMinSize in the parsed custom props object
generation must serialize custom props with JSON.stringify rather than hand-assembled JSON text
globalChecks.fixHint: Regenerate layoutProps.customProps.text from an object with JSON.stringify; do not persist truncated or manually concatenated JSON strings.

rules: criteria.filter should persist only real runtime query defaults
placeholder literals such as None or All are warning-level diagnostics because they often represent unselected UI state
globalChecks.fixHint: Remove sentinel placeholder predicates unless the literal is an intentional data value.
Apply PATCH_REPORT_CONFIG_DEFAULTS before save retry.

rules: workbook payload must pass local schema acceptance for selected projectVersion root schema
all schema-registry relative/path schema rules must pass
unknown keys under strict schema objects are rejected before save
globalChecks.fixHint: Remove schema-invalid payload keys or apply deterministic known-safe sanitization before save.

rules: validation check output must include filterDecisionTrace with all required fields from filter-profiling-contracts.v1.json
when fallbackUsed=true, fallbackReason must be non-empty
when workbook has filter controls, filterDecisionTrace.derivedDecisions must be non-empty
globalChecks.fixHint: Run required execute_logical_sql profiling stage and emit complete filter decision trace before save.

rules: when authoringMode=modify_existing, validation check output must include modifyTrace
modifyTrace must include required fields from edit-operation-contracts.v1.json traceContract.requiredOutputFields
modifyTrace.resolvedWorkbookTarget must include id/name/path fields
when modifyTrace.fallbackUsed=true, modifyTrace.fallbackReason must be non-empty
if modify context args are provided, modifyTrace requestedOperation/sourceMode/resolvedWorkbookTarget.id must match
globalChecks.fixHint: Run modify-workbook.mjs before validation check and emit complete modifyTrace in tool output.

rules: when requestedPluginType is provided, primary plugin view pluginType must match requestedPluginType unless explicit fallback override is provided
requested plugin types must be mapped by model/viz-resolution-profiles.v1.json before generation
globalChecks.fixHint: Regenerate with the requested plugin type, or provide explicit fallback override with target plugin type and reason.

rules: when fallback override is used, fallbackPluginType must equal generated primary pluginType
fallback override requires non-empty fallbackReason
globalChecks.fixHint: Provide fallbackPluginType and fallbackReason when intentionally overriding requested plugin type.

table.fixHint: Move all table measure layers to row edge and clear column edge layers.

table.rule: dataModels.edges.row.edgeLayers.children must contain one dimension layer and one measure layer
table.fixHint: Ensure table row edge carries dimension + measure layers.

table.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.logicalEdges.column must be absent for table views

chart_autoviz.fixHint: Set autoviz innerPluginType to plugin view pluginType.
Add measure-view entry in main data model measuresList.

chart_autoviz.rule: nestedViews.children includes embedded pluginView named MeasureView_0
chart_autoviz.fixHint: Add embedded nested MeasureView_0 and align references.
Add hidden measure layer to autoviz color logical edge.

chart_autoviz.rule: nested measure layer/propertyAdditions include colorMin,colorMax,color and each entry sets valueColumnID, aggRule, stacked=false, grainEdge='none', acrossMeasures='single', placement='first_cell' for colorMin/colorMax and placement='all' for color
chart_autoviz.fixHint: Populate nested measure propertyAdditions with required field/value contract for autoviz rendering.

chart_autoviz.rule: for oracle.bi.tech.chart.donut nested measure/propertyAdditions must also include min.<measureColumnID> and max.<measureColumnID> entries with valueColumnID, aggRule(min/max), stacked=false, grainEdge='none', acrossMeasures='single', placement='first_cell'
chart_autoviz.fixHint: Add donut min/max nested propertyAdditions entries alongside colorMin/colorMax/color.

chart_scatter.rule: oracle.bi.tech.chart.scatter must use exactly one embedded nested plugin view named MeasureView_0; multiple nested MeasureView_* entries trigger marking runtime failure
chart_scatter.fixHint: Collapse scatter measure scaffolding to one embedded MeasureView_0; do not emit MeasureView_1 unless backed by a verified runtime fixture.

chart_scatter.rule: scatter main dataModels.children[0].measuresList.children may reference only the single MeasureView_0 nested view
chart_scatter.fixHint: Remove MeasureView_1 and other nested-view references from scatter measuresList; keep only MeasureView_0.

chart_scatter.rule: scatter logicalEdges.measures must include exactly one measure layer tagged obitech-scatterchart#x and exactly one measure layer tagged obitech-scatterchart#y; x-only, y-only, duplicate-tag, or tagless measure bindings are invalid
chart_scatter.fixHint: Tag scatter measure layers with obitech-scatterchart#x and obitech-scatterchart#y; use exactly one layer for each tag.

chart_scatter.rule: scatter nested MeasureView_0 must carry matching obitech-scatterchart#x/#y measure tags; the x nested measure must include min/max/median propertyAdditions for x and y plus colorMin/colorMax/color for the color measure, and the y nested measure must include a color propertyAddition
chart_scatter.fixHint: Populate scatter MeasureView_0 nested measures from the UI runtime shape: x/y tags, min.<x>, max.<x>, median.<x>, min.<y>, max.<y>, median.<y>, colorMin, colorMax, and color propertyAdditions.

chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Set autoviz innerPluginType to plugin view pluginType.
Add measure-view entry in main data model measuresList.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: nestedViews.children includes embedded pluginView named MeasureView_0
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Add embedded nested MeasureView_0 and align references.
Add hidden measure layer to combo color logical edge.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: nested layer measuresList/propertyAdditions include colorMin,colorMax,color and each entry sets valueColumnID, aggRule, stacked=false, grainEdge='none', acrossMeasures='single', and placement='first_cell' for colorMin/colorMax and placement='all' for color
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Populate nested layer propertyAdditions with required field/value contract.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: viewConfig.settings['oracle.bi.tech.chart.comboMultiLayerChart'].settings.dataLayersInfo exists and has non-empty layer-name keys
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Add combo viewConfig dataLayersInfo map, for example {ndm2:'bar', ndm3:'line'}.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo contains dataLayers object with at least one named layer
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Add logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo with dataLayers metadata for each combo layer.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo.activeDataLayer is a non-empty string and matches a declared layer
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Set activeDataLayer to one of the declared dataLayers keys.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: nested MeasureView_0 dataModels children names include every declared dataLayersInfo layer key
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Create nested data model entries for each declared combo data layer.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: each declared layer has non-empty measure bindings and propertyAdditions in nested MeasureView_0
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Bind each declared layer to at least one measure column with populated propertyAdditions.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: each declared layer maps to non-empty data-layer names across combo viewConfig dataLayersInfo and logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo.dataLayers[].dataModelName, with layer logicalEdges.measures bound
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Align layer names and ensure per-layer logical measure bindings are present.

chart_combo_multilayer.rule: emit measureInfos only when current profile capability allows it
chart_combo_multilayer.fixHint: Remove combo measureInfos for profiles that do not allow it; use dataLayersInfo as portable minimum contract.

pivot.rule: logicalEdges.row.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least one categorical layer
pivot.fixHint: Bind at least one dimension to pivot row edge.

pivot.rule: logicalEdges.col.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least one categorical/temporal layer; logicalEdges.column is schema-invalid for pivot and must be normalized to logicalEdges.col
pivot.fixHint: Bind at least one dimension/temporal field to pivot logicalEdges.col and remove logicalEdges.column.

pivot.rule: logicalEdges.measures.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least one measure layer
pivot.fixHint: Bind at least one measure to pivot measures edge.

gantt.rule: logicalEdges.row.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least one categorical layer for task grouping
gantt.fixHint: Bind at least one category/dimension to gantt row edge.

gantt.rule: logicalEdges.item.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least two time layers tagged obitech-gantt#start and obitech-gantt#end
gantt.fixHint: Bind gantt primary range start/end columns on logical item edge with required start/end tags.

gantt.rule: logicalEdges.detail.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least one categorical layer
gantt.fixHint: Bind at least one category/dimension to gantt logicalEdges.detail.

gantt.rule: gantt start/end tagged item layers must not resolve to the same criteria column expression; end must be distinct or derived from start with a positive offset
gantt.fixHint: Use distinct start/end expressions (for example TIMESTAMPADD(SQL_TSI_DAY, 1, <startExpr>) for end) and persist derived end as userExpression=true.

gantt.rule: primary and nested execution row/column edges must be normalized to a minimal trellis footprint: one row column, one non-start/end column edge column, and no duplicated pane-splitting assignments
gantt.fixHint: Normalize gantt execution row/column edgeLayers to a minimal single-row + single-column binding that avoids start/end pane splitting.

gantt.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo defines non-empty activeDataLayer and dataLayers entry for that layer
gantt.fixHint: Ensure gantt logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo has activeDataLayer and matching dataLayers entry.

gantt.rule: logicalEdges.column must be absent; use logicalEdges.col
gantt.fixHint: Move layers from logicalEdges.column to logicalEdges.col and remove logicalEdges.column.

performance_tile.rule: logicalEdges.measures.logicalEdgeLayers includes at least one measure layer
performance_tile.fixHint: Bind the KPI metric to performance tile logical measures edge.

performance_tile.rule: plugin data model/logical model contains at least one measure column binding
performance_tile.fixHint: Bind a primary measure in criteria and data model.

parallel_coordinates.rule: logicalEdges.row and logicalEdges.col each include at least one layer
parallel_coordinates.fixHint: Bind one dimension and one or more measures in row/col edges.

parallel_coordinates.rule: logicalEdges.col.logicalEdgeLayers contains at least two measure layers
parallel_coordinates.fixHint: Bind at least two measures to parallel coordinates logical col edge.

parallel_coordinates.rule: logicalEdges.detail.logicalEdgeLayers contains at least one layer
parallel_coordinates.fixHint: Bind detail edge layers for parallel coordinates (at minimum include row+measure context columns).

parallel_coordinates.rule: primary and nested execution row/column edges must be normalized to a minimal trellis footprint: one row column and one measure column
parallel_coordinates.fixHint: Normalize parallel coordinates execution row/column edgeLayers to one row dimension and one measure column.

parallel_coordinates.rule: logicalEdges.column must be absent; use logicalEdges.col
parallel_coordinates.fixHint: Move layers from logicalEdges.column to logicalEdges.col and remove logicalEdges.column.

parallel_coordinates.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo defines non-empty activeDataLayer and dataLayers entry for that layer
parallel_coordinates.fixHint: Ensure parallel coordinates logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo has activeDataLayer and matching dataLayers entry.

network_graph.rule: viewConfig.settings['obitech-autoviz/autoviz'].innerPluginType must match pluginType for network-family views
network_graph.fixHint: Set obitech-autoviz/autoviz.innerPluginType to the exact network-family pluginType.

network_graph.rule: logicalEdges.detail.logicalEdgeLayers must contain at least one column layer
network_graph.fixHint: Bind at least one dimension to logicalEdges.detail.

network_graph.rule: logicalEdges.detail.logicalEdgeLayers must contain at least two layers for link/source-target semantics
network_graph.fixHint: Bind at least two columns to logicalEdges.detail (for example source and target/category).

network_graph.rule: primary and nested execution dataModel row edgeLayers must include a stable two-column source-target pairing aligned to logicalEdges.detail
network_graph.fixHint: Normalize row edgeLayers in primary + nested network-family views to the same two detail columns used in logicalEdges.detail.

network_graph.rule: primary and nested execution dataModel column edgeLayers must include a concrete measure columnID (hidden-measure-only is invalid)
network_graph.fixHint: Bind a concrete measure column to column edgeLayers in primary + nested network-family views.

network_graph.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo defines non-empty activeDataLayer and dataLayers entry for that layer
network_graph.fixHint: Ensure network-family logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo has activeDataLayer and matching dataLayers entry.

network_graph.rule: sankey plugin viewConfig.settings must include viz:sankeychart object

map.rule: viewConfig.settings['obitech-autoviz/autoviz'].innerPluginType must match pluginType for map views
logicalEdges.detail.logicalEdgeLayers must contain at least one geography/category column layer
map.fixHint: Bind at least one geography/category column to logicalEdges.detail.

map.rule: logicalEdges.detail.logicalEdgeLayers must include at least one geography-compatible column expression/token
map.fixHint: Bind map detail to a geography-compatible column (for example geo country/state/city/lat/long).

map.rule: viewConfig.settings['viz:chart'].viz_map must exist as an object

map execution dataModel row edgeLayers must include at least one column from logicalEdges.detail; when an embedded MeasureView_0 exists, the nested execution row edge is authoritative and the primary wrapper row edge may remain unbound
map.fixHint: Bind the nested map MeasureView_0 row edge to the selected map detail column; primary wrapper row/column edges may remain unbound for UI-compatible embedded map scaffolds.

map.rule: primary and nested oracle.bi.tech.map execution dataModel axis:"column" edgeLayers must not contain concrete measure bindings because OAC renders this edge as Unused
map.fixHint: Remove measures from execution axis=column for map views. Bind geography/category detail to logicalEdges.detail and execution row, and bind metrics through map-specific measure/color/size/layer roles.

map.rule: logicalDataModel.settings.logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo defines non-empty activeDataLayer and dataLayers entry for that layer
map.fixHint: Ensure map logicalDataModel.dataLayersInfo has activeDataLayer and matching dataLayers entry.

map.rule: when map render type is known, logicalEdges must not contain layers for edges disallowed by that render type
map.fixHint: Drop disallowed logical edge layers for the selected map render type or change render type.

list_narrative.rule: logicalEdges includes at least one non-empty edge layer array among supported edges (for example row/col/detail/glyph/color/size/measures/item/tooltip)
list_narrative.fixHint: Bind at least one field to a supported list/narrative/timeline logical edge.

gauge.rule: plugin data model/logical model contains at least one measure column binding
gauge.fixHint: Bind a primary measure for gauge rendering.

filter_control_viz.rule: filterControlCollections.children must contain at least one filter control definition
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Use filter control scaffold wiring and ensure filterControlCollections contains at least one control.

filter_control_viz.rule: column filter controls must include source column wiring: non-empty columnID + formula.expr.expression
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Set both columnID and formula.expr.expression for each saw:columnFilterControl.

filter_control_viz.rule: column filter controls must include filterControlDefaultValues node
filter controls must satisfy required fields by type (column/parameter/expression/group)
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Populate required fields per control type: columnID/formula for column, parameter for parameter, expr.expression for expression, groupOperator + filterControlCollectionRef for group.

filter_control_viz.rule: every filter control with location=filter_viz must reference an existing canvasfilterviz plugin view via filterControlConfig.settings.filterViz
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Set location=filter_viz controls to a valid filter view name and ensure referenced filter view exists.

filter_control_viz.rule: each layout hosting a filter_viz view must provide filterControlCollectionName and every canvas bound to that layout (via rootLayoutName) must reference the same collection through filterControlCollectionRef.name
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Set layout filterControlCollectionName, keep canvas.rootLayoutName aligned, and set canvas.filterControlCollectionRef.name to the same collection used by the filter_viz layout item.

filter_control_viz.rule: filter_viz views require viz:filter.filterIDMap/parameterIDMap when row bindings or linked controls include column/parameter entries
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Populate viewConfig.settings["viz:filter"].filterIDMap and parameterIDMap for linked filter_viz controls.

filter_control_viz.rule: filter_viz map keys must match logicalDataModel row bindings for corresponding column/parameter layers
each filter_viz map value must resolve to a real filter control ID linked to the same filter view
filter_control_viz.fixHint: Map each key to an existing filter control ID whose location=filter_viz and filterViz points to the same view.

ui_control.rule: plugin view pluginType must be non-empty and mapped through plugin-type-aliases
ui_control.fixHint: Set pluginType to a mapped ui_control plugin and avoid chart-specific data-model assumptions.

ui_control.rule: textbox text content must be persisted at canonical runtime path viewConfig.settings['viz:chart'].textContents.caption.text whenever caption or legacy textbox text is present
ui_control.fixHint: Set textbox content at viewConfig.settings["viz:chart"].textContents.caption.text; legacy textbox paths are migration inputs only.
